summary: In our last video with Sneha Jain, we uncovered why retirement planning can’t wait and how to start thinking about your “Number.” 👉 In this short video, we take the idea forward:

tool.label: Become a Crorepati
tool.reason: Turn the idea into a number. See the two roads to your first crore, and which one is faster for you.

disclaimer: This content is for educational purposes only. It is not investment advice. Please consult a SEBI-registered financial advisor before making investment decisions.
